name: standards-refresh.sh binds prose-judge.sh into enforced_by when a rule's clauses fall back to the semantic moat instead of a deterministic tool DSL
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r17-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Doc

Data retention

Records must be retained for seven years.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; T=$OUT/out/european-union/r17-src.yaml; [ -f $T ] && grep -q 'clauses_fallback: 1' $T && grep -q 'tool: prose-judge.sh' $T && echo fallback-binds-prose-judge 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
